description: Fix strategies for known ROSA HCP test automation issues

rosanetwork_stuck_deletion.name: Remove Finalizers from Stuck ROSANetwork
steps: Check for finalizers on the resource
prerequisites: Permissions to patch resources in namespace
rosanetwork_stuck_deletion.success_criteria: Resource no longer appears in 'oc get rosanetwork'
rosanetwork_stuck_deletion.rollback: None needed - finalizer removal is safe
rosanetwork_stuck_deletion.notes: This fix is safe when CloudFormation stack deletion has already failed or timed out. AWS resources may need manual cleanup.

cloudformation_deletion_failure.name: CloudFormation Stack Manual Cleanup
steps: Check stack events for specific failure reasons
Manually delete orphaned resources (security groups, ENIs)
cloudformation_deletion_failure.rollback: CloudFormation maintains state - can retry deletion
cloudformation_deletion_failure.notes: Most common cause is orphaned security groups with dependencies. Check for ENIs and load balancers using the security groups.

ocm_auth_failure.name: Refresh OCM Token
prerequisites: Access to obtain new OCM token
ocm_auth_failure.rollback: Keep old token until new one is verified
ocm_auth_failure.notes: OCM tokens typically expire after 24 hours. Consider using client credentials for automation.

capi_not_installed.name: Install/Verify CAPI/CAPA
steps: Verify CAPI controllers in capi-system namespace
Verify CAPA controllers in capa-system namespace
capi_not_installed.success_criteria: CAPI and CAPA controllers running and ready
capi_not_installed.notes: CAPI/CAPA are installed as part of MCE configuration. Requires MCE 2.x or ACM 2.x.

api_rate_limit.name: Backoff and Retry
api_rate_limit.success_criteria: Operation completes without rate limit errors
api_rate_limit.notes: Exponential backoff: 60s, 120s, 240s. If rate limiting persists after 3 retries, consider reducing parallel operations.

repeated_timeouts.name: Increase Timeout and Monitor
steps: Check for stuck resources if timeout persists
repeated_timeouts.rollback: Can reduce timeout if operation completes quickly
repeated_timeouts.notes: Repeated timeouts may indicate stuck resources or infrastructure issues. Monitor CloudFormation and Kubernetes resource states.

resource_quota_exceeded.name: Increase Quota or Clean Up Resources
steps: Either request quota increase or delete unused resources
prerequisites: Permissions to view and request quota increases
resource_quota_exceeded.notes: Common quotas: VPCs per region (5), Elastic IPs (5), NAT Gateways (5). Quota increases may take 24-48 hours.

networking_configuration_error.name: Verify Network Configuration
steps: Verify VPC exists and is accessible
Check subnet configurations and availability zones
Verify route tables and internet gateways
networking_configuration_error.success_criteria: All network components properly configured and accessible
networking_configuration_error.notes: ROSA HCP requires specific network configuration: subnets in multiple AZs, proper route tables, NAT gateways for private subnets.

iam_permission_error.name: Verify IAM Permissions and Roles
prerequisites: IAM permissions to view roles and policies
iam_permission_error.success_criteria: All required IAM roles exist with correct permissions
iam_permission_error.notes: ROSA requires specific IAM roles: installer role, support role, worker role, control plane role. Roles are typically created automatically but may need manual creation in some cases.
